title: Any Possible Way to Dump DfgGraph with Logic Value on Nodes in Dfg at a Specific Moment of Simulation
body:
Hi, I'm working on a project where I need logic values on each nodes of Dfg at a specific moment of simulation.
I can dump a DfgGraph of a CPU design by using `verilator --cc --dumpi-dfg 9 --flatten {design.sv} --top {design_name}`.
I can dump the value of all signals including wires and regs with VCD file, but I need the logic value on operater node (the output of operater), for example, ADD, AND, SEL... as well (the internal signals of verilog expression). They are not included in the VCD file, so I have been considering to run graph propagation on the Dfg to obtain them (propagate the logic values from wires and regs to all the rest of node on the Dfg).

**Before I do this, I want to ask:**
_Are there any possible way to dump DfgGraph with logic value on every node in Dfg including operators at a specific moment of simulation with verilator?
If not, is that possible for AST?_
